chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-206 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 04-03-2024 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G and Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
